rationale.R1.1: Identifies the central conceptual issue of conflicting main points and reframes effectively, though without fully naming the load-bearing concept beyond 'benchmark'.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content; identifies potential overreach in original claims.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, minor edits are not.
